page_content:
CPGH250 College Park Scholars: Global Public Health Research Practicum (1-3 Credits)

Supervised research project in an interest area related to global public health.

Prerequisite: CPGH200.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Global Public Health (CPGH) program.

CPGH270 College Park Scholars: Global Public Health Education Abroad Practicum (1-3 Credits)

Education abroad experience in an interest area related to global public health.
